sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8521" key="a)ne/tairos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνέταιρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without friends</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fellows,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.807a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
